name: Nate Peters
text: What is up everyone! I guess I'll kick things off in this channel. I've had the pleasure to meet many of you last semester. I'm an Industrial Engineering first year and love to play spikeball and am getting really into slacklining (if you ever wanna try it hmu)

name: Sudhanshu Mathur
text: Yo! We gotta get this chat ROLLING! I'm Sud, nice to meet you all! I did a marketing class over winter break and we wrote a one-sentence value proposition for ourselves - I wrote "Makes bad jokes, eats a lot of sweet things, works on climate change: Sud is more than happy to be your friend or colleague!" So that's me - what about you?

name: Debby Nguyen
text: Oh my god Sud that's so sweet I guess I'll have to go next bc Education committee is on a roll! I'm currently studying Pharmacy & Data science, I've been in TAMID since fall freshmen year and stayed since!! I love cooking, going on scenic walks, and traveling. I love mountains so when it's safe to go places again I will head to Nepal! If you have unlimited funds to travel to 1 country- where would you go?

name: Nicole Victory
text: Hopping on the education committee train here, hi y'all!!! I'm Nicole, Co-VP of Education alongside Gaea, and it's lovely to meet all of you!! I'm a finance major with a data science minor, and I've been in TAMID since Spring 2020. I love billy Joel and Schmidt from New Girl (Long Island repreSENT), I'm a huge skier/lifter/workout-person, and if I am anything I am absolutely a people's person so feel free to grab coffee or lunch w me anytime so what's your favorite coffee shop around campus?

name: Giovanni Hollis
text: Interrupting this education committee train haha but hey everyone I'm Gio! I'm a 2nd year industrial engineering major looking to double minor in Healthcare systems operations and chinese. I'm a complete beginner in the language so open to learning with/practicing with anyone. I'm apart of the one and only #Lamed class. I like running, cooking (would love recipe recs!) and self help/productivity systems so if anyone uses notion, do you have any tips?

name: Sophia Tan
text: Hey guys! TAMID elderly here from the #Yod class ~ I'm a Marketing Analytics major and doing pre-med; don't ask me how that works because tbh I don't know either. If you know how to play ukulele PLEASE teach me (I can only do Riptide/Falling Down by XXXTentacion badly right now) and love to draw. Below is my drawing of my favorite female artist at the moment, SZA, which doesn't really look like her and is way too orange. Hmu if you want to rant about mental health (which is SO important to maintain) or you want to workout or play volleyball/soccer together!

name: Courtney Lee
text: Hi yallllll!!! I'm Courtney from #Lamed class. 2nd year business administration major with a concentration in finance and a psych major....minor...(?) A little about me, I love color coding so my planners always look like a pastel rainbow threw up in it. Lately in my free time I've been practicing drawing digitally, fine tuning my karate at home, and watching anime lol.

name: Sohum
text: Hey hey y'all! Let's get back on this education committee introduction train! I'm a cell and molecular bio major doing pre-med, and I've been in tamid since spring last year. I love working out, peanut butter (pb ice cream = mind blown), and Netflix (currently peer pressured into watching Queens Gambit). Fun fact: I'm a HUGE proponent of the Oxford comma. Oh and I love ice cream... like a lot (lmk ur fav flavor)!

name: Allie Rozenblyum
text: Hey everyone! I'm Allie :) first year Business Administration and Marketing student. Possibly looking into a consulting minor but not sure about that yet. I'm here in Boston on campus if anyone's down to grab a coffee, lunch, or have a zoom chat hit me up. I love to bake, take photos of literally everywhere I go and every food I eat, watch America's Next Top Model, self-help books, and plan out my life lol. Excited to meet you lovely people.

name: Allison Zlotnick
text: Hi guys, my name is Allison from Mem Class and I'm a first year Health Science & Business major! I'm strongly leaning towards a concentration in Healthcare Management & Consulting and a minor in Human Services. I'm so excited to have a community of other business students, since I've only had access to Bouve mentors thus far. In my free time I've been checking out all that Boston has to offer, so I'd love some recs on spots that are must-sees! Can't wait to meet you all :)

name: Michelle Mirkin
text: Hi everyone, my name is Michelle Mirkin and I am a Business Administration major with a concentration in finance and a minor in consulting. I'm a second year (technically a Junior because I got bored and took 4 extra classes during quarantine) and I was previously in Nu.In Greece in 2019! My interests include food, travel, fashion, consulting, financial accounting etc.. I'm currently living off campus in Boston! I'm always down to chat so feel free to message me anytime!

name: Will Pearson
text: Hello! My name is William Pearson, and I am a second-year studying Finance and Economics. On campus, I am involved with Huntington Angels Network and Delta Sigma Pi. I am so excited to join TAMID and hope to join the Investment Fund and Consulting tracks. Outside of school, I enjoy running, exploring the city and new restaurants, as well as going to the beach and being on the water. I am from Portland, ME but will be in Los Angeles this summer - I cannot wait for some real heat! Anyone who knows me also knows that I hate the cold. I am in Boston currently and would love to meet/Zoom with anyone interested. Bonus if you're from or going to LA and will keep me company over the summer!

name: Daria Kukhar
text: Hey guys! My name is Daria Kukhar and I am a first year majoring in international business. I am originally from a small town in North Jersey. Some of my interests include volleyball, skiing, J. Cole, Russian lit, Kanye West, dessert, Classic Rock, dancing, and true crime (although the list generally changes every week). It's been a pleasure getting to know all of you over the past couple of days! Hit me up if anyone wants to grab coffee or something, always down to chat.

name: Sadye Herman
text: Hi everyone! My name is Sadye Herman and I am a second year studying business (with a concentration in finance) and political science. I also have a journalism minor. I did NUin London last year! I am from Needham, MA which is about 25 minutes away but I am on campus now. I am really excited to be a part of TAMID and meet so many new people! I am a huge foodie and love trying to new foods. I am obsessed with avocado and love sushi. I actually made a food instagram account this year called saydsfoods if you want to follow. Feel free to reach out I really want to meet more people and would love to talk, get food, or hangout!

name: Simran Bajaj
text: Hi everyone! My name is Simran Bajaj and I'm a 2nd year Business & Psych major with a concentration in Corporate Innovation & Venture! I'm thinking of a consulting minor also! I'm from South Brunswick, New Jersey but I'm off-campus in Boston right now! I did NUin Berlin in 2019 which was absolutely amazing and I can't wait to go back there sometime again! I love to travel, draw/paint, dance, drink coffee and boba, eat brunch food, entrepreneurship, and marvel to name a few things. Outside of TAMID, I am part of the Entrepreneurs club and NU Rangila dance team. I love talking to people so definitely reach out at anytime! I'm also down to explore coffee and brunch places all over Boston :)

name: Daniel Goldberg
text: Hi everyone! My name is Daniel Goldberg and I'm a second year majoring in Business Administration with a Concentration in Finance. I plan on pursuing a minor in Law & Public policy as well! I'm off campus in Boston right now and am so happy to be back in Boston! I am also a part of the Pre-Law Fraternity and am aiming to join more clubs next semester. I love interacting with others and would love to make some new friends! Feel free to reach out!!

name: Nikola Dobrev
text: Hey everyone! I'm Nikola Dobrev and I'm a first year majoring in Comp Sci/Business Administration, but I'm thinking of switching to Data Science/BA. I'm from Revere, MA and I'm currently living on campus. Some things I enjoy are soccer, basketball, photography, fashion/sneakers, drinking boba tea, and Blue biking around Boston. I'm looking forward to meeting some new friends, so feel free to reach out!

name: Gary Shetye
text: Hey Im Gary. Im a second year data science and finance major. I'm from Tampa, FL. I love sports and I played soccer my whole life. I also love cooking and eating and chilling (when I have time to). I live on the hill so I'm never really on campus. I also did Nu.in London last year.

name: Joshua Tetteh
text: Hey everyone! My name is Joshua Tetteh and I'm a freshmen majoring in Business administration(finance) and psychology. I'm from Brewster New York and currently dorming in Stetson East. Some of my hobbies include watching/playing basketball, working out, drawing, drinking boba tea(get the milk taro tea with no ice, boba balls, and two servings of Oreos) it doesn't sound right but hits every-time. Excited to meet everyone!

name: Erin Kim
text: Hey guys, I'm Erin, a second-year BA major concentrating in Marketing and Biology minor! I'm from northern NJ but I'm on-campus in Boston right now. Outside of TAMID, I'm involved in the Korean American Student Association and did Revolve Dance Crew for a bit. In my free time, I like to dance, learn languages, and analyze films. A fun fact is that my method of listening to music is putting an album on repeat and just playing through all the songs; when I get tired of one album, I just switch over to a different album. I'm down to hang with anyone in Boston, so feel free to hit me up! :))

name: Daniel Blundin
text: Hey everyone! I'm Daniel and I am a first year studying Business with a concentration in Finance and (probably) a minor in Econ! I'm from Beverly MA which is only about 40 minutes north of the city. I am living in West Village A North this semester with some friends I met last semester in NUin. I love playing tennis when the weather is cooperative, reading, cooking, playing strategy games like civ and eu4, and I'm always willing to chat about anything (even economics)! So far TAMID has been a great experience, and it's my only club currently. Looking to join 1 or 2 later on if you guys have any suggestions. I'm psyched to be doing ifc and education right now so I can help out with investment fund! I can't wait to meet all of you.

name: Jesus Garcia Montoro
text: Hey guys, I'm Jesus and I'm a 3rd year studying Business, concentrating in finance and MIS, and pursuing a minor in strategy. Originally I come from Spain, from a little city called Valencia where I studied in a German school and therefore apart from English and Spanish I speak fluent German. On campus apart from TAMID I'm also currently an senior analyst for NUImpact. A little bit about me: I am not a super athletic person although I do like basketball a lot and skiing, but my real passion is wakeboarding and sailing, sadly I can only do that in the summer. In terms of my interests, I am super into Marvel and honestly almost every science field(if you want to talk about gene therapy, quantum physics or new sources of renewable energy hmu), I am a really curious person. When it comes to shows I thought the Office was hilarious and I really liked the plot of Dark (it's a Netflix show). This semester I joined the consulting track and IFC and hopefully I get to meet you all at some point!

name: Rebecca Swernofsky
text: Hey there! I'm Rebecca. I'm a 2nd year in education this semester! I'm majoring in computer science and currently on co-op at a small startup called Paperless Parts! Hot take: I love Fundies 1 but maybe I'm biased because I tutor it. I'm originally from the Bay Area but right now I'm living off campus near Berkeley! I think I'm in love with Boston and I feel happiest when I'm outside - I love running and hiking and trees! I'm also really into thrifting (saving $$), cooking vegan meals with my roommates (I make some mean pancakes), relaxing on Shabbat, and buying veggies at Haymarket. I'm really interested in how companies are formed/grow (last semester I was in Generate) and I'm excited to learn more about that & more in TAMID! I'm also really excited to get to know all of you!!

name: Madison Taylor
text: Hi everyone, I'm Maddy Taylor! I am a first-year and just had my first education class tonight. I'm majoring in Political Science and Economics and hope to become a Lawyer. I'm from Cape Cod and have 2 older brothers and an English Cream Retriever. Lastly, I love the soup in Stetson West.

name: Hannah Abbo
text: Hey guys!! I'm Hannah Abbo and I am from Panama City, Panama! I am a sophomore, studying Business Admin, Marketing Analytics and maybee neuroscience. One of my favorite things is book hunting (hmu for book recs) and doing yoga!! I'm very excited for this opportunity and meeting you all!

name: Pooja Nandhyala
text: Hi everyone! I'm Pooja and I'm from Edison, NJ! I'm a junior majoring in Economics and Business Admin, with a concentration in Finance. I really love to travel (I went to NU.in London during my freshman year, too) and am interested in cooking/baking! I also started taking boxing classes and love it (lmk if you wanna be boxing buddies)! I'm looking forward to getting to know you lovely people!!

name: Joel Rosen
text: Hi everyone! I'm Joel and I'm from Hopkinton, Mass. I'm a first year computer science student in Nuin Boston. A little about me: I love to workout. I did gymnastics all of my life up until the end of high school. I also love to ski (definitely interested in going on a TAMID ski trip). Some of my favorite shows are The Office, Breaking Bad, Money Heist, and anything Marvel. I'm a very curious person and I am always looking to learn or do new things. Im super excited to join this community and meet you all! (also im a big foodie so if anyone wants to go explore new food places hmu)

name: Nicolas Araujo
text: Hi everyone, I'm Nico and I'm from Argentina. I am a second year doing a combined major in comp sci and Mathematics. I moved to the US, more specifically CT, when I was 7 so I have grown up with a bit of both cultures. I go back often though since my dads side of the family is pretty big, so the holidays in Argentina are always something I look forward to. Aside from my family I'm really into movies, just started watching a lot of quinten Tarantino's films since I had never gotten into them, but lmk if you want/have any movie recommendations. I am also very into making things through tinkering, an example was my electric longboard that has since broken, but I hope to fix it soon. Finally, I enjoy playing rugby and soccer casually from time to time but most of all skiing. Looking forward to getting to know you guys and being a part of Tamid!

name: Christian Cassanelli
text: Hey everyone! I'm Christian and I'm from Jupiter, Florida. I'm a second year with a concentration in finance and a minor in data science. Outside of school, I love watching sports with friends, playing fantasy football, going to the gym and being outdoors. I also love cooking, especially Italian food being that I'm Italian. I'm looking forward to meeting you all, and am excited for this first semester of being a TAMID member!

name: Nathaniel Cohen
text: Hi everybody! I'm Nate and I'm from Philadelphia. I'm currently a third year majoring in finance and entrepreneurship. It's always been a dream of mine to get into product development and eventually start my own business after college. Some things that I enjoy doing in my free time are sailing, tennis, skiing/snowboarding, DJing, fly fishing, and community service. If I had to eat only one food for the rest of my life it would probably be pasta. My favorite place to travel is Costa Rica and I have been going ever since I was young to visit family. My favorite show right now is Billions and some of my top Spotify artists are Lil Uzi Vert, Travis Scott, and Post Malone. I'm excited to meet you all over the next few semesters!!

name: Tiffany
text: Hi guys!! I'm Tiffany and Im from the bay area (specifically San Jose). I'm currently a first year in NUin boston atm and am majoring in finance business admin with a minor in data science. Some of my favorite things to do are exploring cafes, thrifting, photography, dance, and drawing (artsy ik haha). Some of my fav shows of all time are avatar the last airbender, aot, jjk, and the fosters. I'm also a major foodie and love exploring new places to eat in Boston. I look forward to getting to know you all in TAMID!!

name: Shannon Assouline
text: Hi everyone! My name is Shannon, I'm from Chicago, and I'm a first year cybersecurity major. In my free time, I like to longboard (just recently did it along the charles river esplanade which was so beautiful; please share other cool places/things to do in Boston!), sketch in my recipe book, read (currently halfway through the unbearable lightness of being), and I'm learning how to play chess. I also really enjoy volunteering, and over the summer I worked at a restaurant in Copenhagen that operated on a pay-what-you-can model, which was a great experience. I'm super excited to join TAMID and meet you all !!

name: Sophie Stevens
text: Hi everyone! I'm Sophie Stevens, a first year studying Finance in the Business school. I was born in Western Massachusetts (the Berkshires) but have lived in Upstate New York and Philadelphia. I love to bake and cook, my favorite things to bake being challah and love cooking Mediterranean style food. I also enjoy cycling, playing basketball, and taking long walks around the city. This past year, I took a gap year working at a coffee company, first making lattes but soon running their wholesale department! If you ever want a latte, I'll be happy to make you one! I also enjoying listening to music. I really enjoy rap music and some of my favorite artists are J. Cole, Drake, Meek Mill, Mac Miller, and Lil Mosey. So excited to be in TAMID and meet everyone!

name: Anshul Shirude
text: Hey everyone! I'm Anshul and I'm from Burlington, Mass. Currently, I'm doing a combined major in CS and Math, and staying in the best hall on campus (White hall). Some of my passions include tennis, football, basketball, trying new food, cooking occasionally, and exploring the city. I also love giving back to the community and traveling to new places. I'm so excited for what TAMID holds for the future and can't wait to meet you all!

name: Yunona Uritsky
text: Hey everyone!! I'm Yunona and I'm from Brookline, Mass. I'm a first year, and as of right now, I'm doing a combined major in Business Administration and Psychology. I absolutely LOVE art and drawing in my free time, so if anyone ever wants to go to any art exhibits definitely hmu :) I'm also super into snowboarding and really looking forward to winter because of that. Spontaneous trips are almost always a yes for me, especially if sushi is incorporated at some point. I can't wait to meet you guys. Always down to hangout and have some good conversations.

name: Evan Cook
text: Hello everyone! I am Evan, and I was born in Minnesota but grew up in Nara, Japan. I am a first year majoring in Computer Science and Business. I am currently living in White Hall (right across from Marino). I am into the NFL and a big Vikings fan (it's been tough...). I also enjoy watching the latest Marvel and Star Wars shows and movies (still haven't seen Shang-Chi yet though). I am also really into music, classical music especially. I am just about to head out to a BSO concert featuring John Williams! (He made the music for Star Wars, Harry Potter, Indiana Jones, E.T., Jurassic Park, etc...) I also play the violin (poorly) and the piano (much better), and I sometimes even compose. I really enjoyed meeting some of you at the first Education meeting, and I cannot wait to meet everyone else!

name: Luke Conmy
text: Hey everyone! I'm Luke and I am from Norwood, New Jersey. I am a third year studying Finance, Fintech, and Accounting. I just completed my first co-op working for Amundi US doing corporate finance and accounting, and am currently in the midst of applying to my second one. I am a big sports fan and because I live very close to New York, most of the teams I like are hated in Boston. (Yankees are winning the World Series this year). In high school I played basketball and ran track and I love to play pickup basketball at Marino, so if anyone ever wants to play let me know! As for TV shows and movies, I am really big into any thriller/mind bender types (some of my favorites are The Sopranos, Shutter Island, and Inception). During the summer, I love going to the Jersey Shore. My family and I usually do a trip every year to Long Beach Island, for anyone who knows it. I am so excited to be a part of TAMID and look forward to meeting everyone! Here's to a great semester!

name: Suraj Ramchandran
text: Hi everyone! I am Suraj and I'm originally from Mumbai, India. I am a first-year and pursuing a major in computer science (and most probably will tack on a minor in business). Despite being from India, I have lived all over the world and currently call Dubai home. In my free time I enjoy hanging out with friends, taking creative pictures and tinkering with technology. (Oh and not to mention binge watching YouTube). I love all kinda of music but lately I've been listening to a lot of rap with Pop Smoke, and Post Malone being my favorites. But I also frequently listen to The Weeknd, Guns and Roses, and more.

name: Aarshiya Sachdeva
text: Hi guys!! I'm Aarshiya and i'm from Shrewsbury MA! i'm a 2nd year majoring in data science/business admin & minoring in music industry. I looove to sing and perform and i've actually sang at events and concerts all over the country (p.s. singing at afterhours tonight!!) i also love to dance & make TikToks (please do not search me up), traveling, hiking, listening to music, and going on spontaneous adventures in boston! super excited to meet y'all.

name: Eri Dumesh
text: Hey everyone! My name is Eri Dumesh and I am from Staten Island, New York. I am of Belarussian and Jewish descent and I know how to speak Russian. I am currently a second-year pursuing Finance & Corporate Innovation & Venture, and I am on my first Co-Op search! I am a huge music fan, but lately I have been listening to mostly EDM and Hip-Hop. I love movies as I can't seem to keep my interest in shows, and particularly like Korean and Japanese films: my favorite director being Bong Joon-Ho. I am always down for an adventure and I love nature and hikes. I like basketball, football, wrestling, and MMA, and my favorite team is the Dallas Mavericks. Usually I am in the gym, studying, exploring Boston (especially the different food spots), or just relaxing! Great to meet all of you!

name: Hebron Gurara
text: Hey friends! I'm Hebron from Cincinnati Ohio. I'm a first year studying International Affairs and International Business with a minor in Law and Public Policy. I'm a HUGE coffee enthusiast! Scouting for new coffee shops is my favorite thing to do! In my free time you can find me at a museum, consuming sushi, reading a book, or listening to a podcast. So excited to be a part of TAMID this semester, and I'm looking forward to getting to know you all this year!

name: Caroline Ho
text: Hii everyone! I'm Caroline and I'm from Delaware. I'm currently a first year majoring in industrial engineering with possibly some kind of business minor - still trying to decide which one so lmk if you have thoughts! I love going on hikes and walks, cooking and food (i have a food instagram lol), and I've played instruments almost my whole life (viola, piano, a little guitar), so I'm always down to jam. So excited to get to know you all - feel free to reach out to chat/hang! (or to offer me your best bribe for smuggled dining hall cookies hahah)

name: Evan Chu
text: Heyy everybody! I know this is a little late, but I am Evan and I am from Bergen County, New Jersey. I am third year majoring in Business Administration with concentrations in finance and accounting. I am thinking about picking up an data science major so if you are in data science let me know. I am a huge foodie with preferences in Asian food so if you want any recs lmk and I love cooking food (thinking about making thai iced tea today). In my free time I like to play video games, grocery shop, and watch some netflix. Cannot wait to meet all of you guys :)

name: Kristoffer Amerman
text: Heyoo :) Sorry for posting so late but my name is Kris and I'm from Phoenix, Arizona. I'm a first year majoring in computer science and cognitive psychology. I love listening to music and talking long walks or drives. Some of my favorite artists are Glass Animals, Still Woozy, The 1975, The Neighbourhood, Unlike Pluto, Brockhampton, Hippocampus, SG Lewis, BENEE, Borns, Doja, Porter Robinson, and so on. I'm also an aspiring plant and husky dad. If you have any show recs pls let me know! I can't wait to work with you guys.

name: Alessandro Pugliese
text: Hey everyone! I'm Alex and I'm from Edison, New Jersey. I'm a first-year studying business administration with concentrations in Accounting and Finance. I love movies (The Godfather, Goodfellas), TV Shows (The Office, How I Met Your Mother), and listen to basically every genre of music. Soccer is a huge part of my life as I have been playing it since I was five. My favorite team is Juventus, an Italian team based out of Turin. I'm a HUGE coffee drinker and will always be up for a latte run. So excited to meet you all and get to learn more about Tamid!

name: Jonathon Piesik
text: Hi Everyone! My name is Jonathon Piesik. I'm a first-year student studying business with concentrations in finance and accounting, I'm also planning on doing a political science minor. I'm from Cumberland, Maine and as a typical Mainer, I'm an avid outdoorsman. I love to hike, run, camp, ski, and surf. I typically spend my free time with friends and family or playing soccer. You can find me at Carter or Marino every day. I'm also a huge podcast guy, some of my favorites are Planet Money, The Red Chip Poker Podcast, and BDGE Fantasy Football. Let me know if you have any suggestions! I Can't wait to meet everyone!

name: Brett Netkin
text: Hey everyone! My name is Brett Netkin and I am a first-year student studying finance and computer science. I'm from Springfield, New Jersey and I love sports. I played soccer and golf in high school, both of which I love and continue to play. I'd like to try out for the club golf team at some point, although I'm focused on several other things at the moment. I love participating in intramurals here at Northeastern, although it does get kind of frustrating when players and teams don't show up to games. I follow football very closely and compete in multiple fantasy football leagues every year (if anyone wants to play next year let me know). I'm super excited to get to know everyone in TAMID!

name: Ella Hutnick
text: Hi y'all! I'm Ella, a first-year combined major in business admin and political science, minoring in Spanish. My interests include brunch and coffee, alt/indie/rock music, movies (letterboxd plug- ekhutnick), and Snell (but only between the hours of 10 pm and 3am). I'm from Kansas City, so I try to take advantage of the railways and explore outside the city as much as I can. I also dance, so I'm always up for a one-off class at one of the studios in town. Excited to meet everyone!

name: Neha Prasad
text: Hi everyone! My name is Neha and I'm a second year Computer Science major with minors in Business and Consulting. Im from Westborough, MA which is about 40 min west of Boston. I'm on eboard for an cappella group on campus (Distilled Harmony) so I love to sing lol. We actually have a show tomorrow at Blackman at 7pm and y'all should come :)) I also enjoy working out hanging out with people. I want to potentially join the Triathlon team on campus at some point. I have been told I get very excited talking about food so if anyone has some good suggestions lmk. I love deep talks and just having a good time so I can't wait to meet everyone and get to know all of you!!

name: Jacob Kline
text: Hey y'all! My name is Jacob and I'm studying Computer Science and Biology! I'm from Chicago, IL (like actually the city). I'm a first year but the age of a second year because I took a gap year. I'm interested in CS and medicine and TAMID seems like a really cool opportunity to expand my horizons. I like Harry Potter (I'm actually reading the books for the first time and I'm on the 4th book), playing cards, and improv. I'd love to get to know people better so if you wanna get together for some coffee, please reach out! Looking forward to meeting you :). Also I hear reactions are a big deal in TAMID so if you want put a funny reaction I encourage weird ones lol

name: Adam Burroughs
text: Hey guys, my name is Adam Burroughs. I'm a first year International Affairs and International Business major. I've lived internationally my whole life - Singapore, Brazil, Switzerland, Illinois, North Carolina, and Tennessee. I'm super interested in politics and my dream is to work at the IMF, World Bank, or another financial IGO. I love to meet new people and eat new types of foreign food! I'm currently establishing the International Business Club here at Northeastern, so if you are interested in strategy and learning about international affairs, talk to me! I'm always free to chat and learn new things!

name: Esha Walia
text: Hi everyone! My name is Esha Walia, and I am a first-year majoring in business administration. I am from San Diego, California, so the weather has been quite an adjustment! I am super excited to be in Education this semester. I really like to explore new places, run, and try new foods/cook and bake. I also like making new friends, so I look forward to this semester. I love getting iced coffee, so let me know if you have any recs for places to try!

name: Jasmine McCoy
text: Hey y'all! My name is Jasmine and I'm a first year Computer Science and Business Administration major. I'm from a city called Grovetown (yes, we have cows) so I'm always down to go to the city and do whatever. I like to sleep, eat, and rewatch my favorite movies/tv shows. My favorite movies being Kingsman, Encanto, and most of the MCU ones. I can't wait to meet you all!

name: Kelly Servan
text: Hi guys! My name is Kelly Servan and I'm from Lima, Peru. I'm a first year business and psychology major and thoroughly enjoying it! Some of my interests are watercolor painting, baking, reading, and going shopping. I also love going to the cinema, I used to go every week back home, but I still haven't been to one here in Boston! My favorite movies are from Marvel, I love them with a passion. I'm excited to meet all of you soon. If you ever wanna meet for a coffee or want someone to go shopping with, reach out! Also, if you have any recommendations for Italian restaurants let me know! I'm trying to find the best one here! The one I've liked the most until now is Nico's.

name: Elissa Alarmani
text: hey everyone! i'm Elissa and I'm a first-year from Medway, Mass. i am currently a combined major in CS and Business Administration with a minor in Architectural and Urban History. In my free time i love watching reality TV and reading. i also love food, always looking to try places but my favorite is sushi, given that when I'm home I work at the local sushi restaurant (yama fuji in medway <3). I love listening to music and going to concerts! Constantly looking for new artists coming to Boston and people to drag to concerts with, some of my favorite artists are Samia, Lana Del Rey, Nicki Minaj (obviously), Phoebe Bridgers, Clairo, and Frank Ocean. Always open to music and other media recs, excited to get to know you all!

name: Sophie Lin
text: Hi everyone!! I'm Sophie and I am a second year studying economics and finance. I'm from Connecticut but was born in a suburb of Philly and I'm also a dual Canadian-American citizen. I love staying active through soccer, hiking, or taking unnecessarily long walks through the city. I'm into traveling and photography as well (so if you need headshots let me know haha). I am obsessed with music and spend way too much time making Spotify playlists. The remaining part of my time is probably spent looking at food and restaurants because I am a huge foodie and will drop everything to get any type of food (or coffee!) with you. I love a good thrill and am super adventurous!! My favorite TV show is The Office or honestly anything HGTV. Also I really love Chick-fil-A and the fact that it's finally in Boston. I am so excited to meet everyone! Please don't hesitate to reach out :))

name: Isaac Gotian
text: Hey everyone! My name is Isaac Gotian. I'm a first-year studying Math and Business with a concentration in Finance. I am from Wayne, New Jersey, which is around 30 minutes outside of NYC. I love playing sports and staying active. I played soccer in high school, and I am currently on two intramural soccer teams. I enjoy following basketball (I find sports analytics super interesting) and I'd love to compete in a fantasy basketball league next year! In my free time, I enjoy walking around Boston and finding new places (my favorite place in Boston at the moment is the public library - its so beautiful!). If anyone wants to explore the city together, please reach out! I'm looking forward to meeting everybody!

name: Brianna Lei
text: Hellooo my name is Brianna Lei, but most people call me Bri and I'm from Peru. This is my first sem in Boston since I just got back from Nu.in London so I'm very pumped to meet new people and explore the city jaja. Currently a first year Business Major with a concentration in management (but trying to change to a double major with a concentration in finance). In my free time I like to play tennis, bake and DANCE. I cannot stress that enough, you'll probably see me breakdance somewhere around campus. I swear by bossa nova music (little mix between jazz and Brazilian) and reggaeton or anything latino. Coming back from London I realized I love travelling and exploring a lot <3 Def a rom-com type of person, but I also enjoy watching criminology docs. I also like to day trade, I'm very curious abt the market. One of my fave books is The Intelligent Investor by Benjamin Graham because he talks a lot abt the psych of trading and investing which I find cool. BIG foodie, love going restaurant hunting and finding hidden food gems. If you're ever down to go food hunting or just wanna hang lmk! Lets talk.

name: Ryan Tabrizi
text: How's it going guys, my name is Ryan Tabrizi. I am a first year studying finance from Orange County, CA (in-between San Diego and LA). I've played hockey pretty much my whole life and also play the cello. I'm a big LA sports fan(rams are Winning the Super Bowl), love to read, and also listen to music. Im excited to start a new journey with TAMID and can't wait to meet everyone!

name: Benjamin Rice
text: Hey everyone! My name is Ben Rice. Most of my friends back home call me rice so you can either call me ben or rice or both - I'll most likely respond. I am a first-year studying marketing and data science. I grew up in Los Angeles but recently moved to the beautiful state of Colorado. While living in both California and Colorado I grew a loving for anything outdoor - whether it be hiking, snowboarding, or surfing, i'm there. Play sports, listen to music, and read are some of the things I do during my free time. I played soccer most my life and enjoy just going to the fields to kick the ball around with friends - maybe get a little pickup going. I'm a pretty big ODESZA listener but Id like to think I listen to pretty much everything. My favorite author is Albert Camus but honorable mention to Ben Mezrich. I look forward to meeting everyone!

name: Janani Ilangovan
text: Hi! I'm Janani, and I'm from Rockville, MD. I'm a first-year Business + Econ major. Some of my hobbies include cooking, lifting, and exploring new coffee shops. I love listening to music, but I'm too lazy to make my own playlists, so lmk if you guys have any good ones. I'm super excited for TAMID and to meet all of you!

name: Erica Yang
text: Hey everyone! I'm Erica and I'm from the Bay Area in California. I'm a first year studying Business Administration with a concentration in Finance and a minor in Data Science. I absolutely love food and cooking/baking for other people; I find kneading dough super therapeutic for some reason. I also worked as a barista all throughout high school so I'm a big coffee drinker, def hmu for some coffee study dates.

name: Markus Zaba
text: Hey everyone! I'm Markus and I'm from Salt Lake City, Utah. I'm a first year Economics and Philosophy double major. I love to play poker (and any sort of card game), all kinds of sports- but mainly hockey, soccer, and skiing- listening to music, playing guitar, going shopping and fashion in general, and a long list of other stuff. I'm super stoked to meet all of you and be a part of TAMID!!

name: Michael Redko
text: Hey everyone! My name is Michael Redko and I'm a second year combined computer science and finance major. I am from the Bay Area in California and I love all northern California Sport teams. I am constantly watching the Golden State Warriors (love Stephen Curry), the San Fransisco 49ers (love George Kittle), and the San Jose Sharks. My favorite sport is soccer and I am a huge Manchester United fan as well, mainly because of Cristiano Ronaldo. If anyone ever wants to watch sports, definitely hmu! Some of my other hobbies include skiing, listening to music, biking, playing piano, and anything outdoors. I listen to a lot of indie music but I am always open to finding new artists. So if anyone has song suggestions, please send them my way! I am so excited to meet all of you soon and I look forward to winning the scavenger hunt.

name: Anna Kim
text: Hi everyone! My name is anna and i'm a first year computer science major and entrepreneurial startups minor. I'm from London, England, but I don't have an accent hahaha. Some other places I've lived in are Germany, Virginia, Rhode Island, and North Carolina, but London is the longest place I've lived in so I consider it home. I play for the club soccer team here at northeastern and enjoy skiing, working out, and hiking. I also love crime tv shows (favorites include law and order svu and chicago pd) and my favorite movies are interstellar and inception. I'm also into food and will always be down to try literally anything (send any recommendations!). Really excited to get know everyone :)

name: Ayush Rana
text: Hey guys, my name is Ayush Rana. I am a first-year Computer Science major and I am from the Bay Area. I love skiing, running, and playing spike ball. I really like watching soccer. My favorite movie of all time is Kung Fu Panda 2 and my favorite TV shows are Attack on Titan and Inside the NBA. Besides that, I watch a lot of YouTube and I'm a big fan of Yes Theory. I'm excited to meet everyone!

name: Eddie Mercurio
text: Hi everyone! I'm Eddie and I'm from River Vale, New Jersey. I'm a sophomore studying Business Administration with a Finance concentration and Data Science minor. I love exploring Boston and trying new restaurants so if you have any recommendations please let me know! I enjoy all sorts of outdoor activities (hiking, biking, skiing, running, going to the beach etc) and listening to music in my free time. Looking forward to meeting you all!

name: Esha Patel
text: Hi everyone! My name is Esha and I'm from Bergen County, NJ. I'm a second year studying International Business with a concentration in finance and a minor in Spanish. I'm also a big foodie so I love cooking and trying new restaurants. Outside of TAMID, I'm also on e-board for WiF. Love meeting new people so definitely feel free to reach out! Can't wait for the semester ahead!

name: Karen Vu
text: Hiii u guyss!!! My name is Karen Vu and I'm a first year business and econ major from Huntington Beach, California. Back in California, i LOVE playing poker with friends and going to the beach. In terms of shows and music, I believe To All The Boys I've Loved Before is the romcom of our generation and Olivia Rodrigo is the musician of our generation. So excited to meet you all woohooo!

name: Megan Avdoo
text: Hi everyone! My name is Megan Avdoo and I am a first-year student in the explore program (undecided). I'm from Long Island, New York. I also love getting coffee so if anyone knows any good places to try I'd love to hear recommendations. So excited to get to know you all!!!

name: Ayush Rastogi
text: Hey fellow TAMID members! My name is Ayush Rastogi and I'm from Hillsborough, New Jersey and I am a first-year computer science and business administration major concentrating in finance. My favorite hobbies are hanging out with friends, playing card games, discovering cool places to see, and playing basketball. My music taste mostly consists of songs that have unique production. My favorite artist is Kanye West, if yours is too let me know what your favorite song of his is. Some of my cool skills are being able to dunk a tennis ball and being bilingual in English and DrRacket. I'd like to think I'm a funny guy but my friends might tell you otherwise. I can't wait to get to know everyone better!

name: Aaryan Sinha
text: Hey everyone! I'm Aaryan and I'm a first-year CS major. I'm from Singapore, Singapore (yes, only one city in Singapore :D). My favorite artists at the moment are Kanye West, Kendrick Lamar and ODESZA and I love hip-hop, EDM and indie music. Lmk if you have any concert recommendations in Boston. Looking forward to meeting you all!

name: Nathan Kane
text: Hey guys! My name is Nate and I am a first year Business and Economics combined major concentrating in Finance. I am from Nashua, New Hampshire which is just an hour north of Boston and yes... that means I am a huge skier. I am always down for a good game of poker, Spikeball, or pickup basketball so feel free to text me if you need one more man! My favorite show of all time is definitely Blacklist although I am really enjoying White Collar and Ozark currently. I am also a MCU junkie and my rankings go Infinity War, Civil War, then No Way Home. I love Fantasy Football and am a die hard Patriots fan (RIP Brady). I cannot wait to meet you all and please feel to reach out to hangout or go get food! I need to expand my horizon past El Jefes.

name: Sofia Mott
text: Hey Guys!!! I'm Sofia, a second year Business Administration major with a concentration in Entrepreneurship and Social Innovation. I was born in Chatham, New Jersey but moved to Camden, Maine when I was 5 and grew up there ever since! Our Camden town slogan is "where the mountains meet the sea" and that is certainly true. It was a beautiful place to grow up but I am happy to be in a city now! I'm so excited to get to know you all! I love being with my friends and family (I have a huge family, 3 siblings and 6 step siblings!) I also love skiing, working out, music and fashion! Feel free to reach out! I'm always down for a coffee, walk, and I hate to admit, but a good rom-com or Harry Potter marathon...

name: Ellie Bussey
text: Hi everyone!!!! I'm Ellie Bussey and I'm so excited to get to know everybody wooooo!! I'm a second-year Business Administration major with a concentration in social innovation and entrepreneurship but I'm hoping to tack on a new minor soon. I'm from the absolute middle of nowhere in Tennessee (and nowhere close to Nashville unfortunately) so naturally I love animals and nature, but I'll still slander country music until the day I die. I love concerts, hiking, exploring Boston, and thrifting - pleeeease give me good local thrift store recommendations, I'm in dire need. I also really want to visit a beach close by soon even though everyone tells me it'll be anti-climatic and cold. I have faith. Still, I love making new friends so definitely reach out about grabbing coffee or lunch anytime!

name: Gabi Mitchell
text: Hey everyone, I am so excited to meet you all! My name is Gabi and I'm a first year majoring in CS and Design. I am from Dallas, Texas (so not ready for the cold) and I have four siblings! In my free time I love going on long walks, traveling, getting boba or coffee, and am always down to explore new places in Boston!!

name: Bailey Hara
text: Hi guys!! I'm Bailey! I'm a second year supply chain management and psychology major with a minor in biology. I'm from Chicago and have lived there my whole life, so I really love being in big cities. Huge fan of LA and jealous of anyone who lives there. I'm always looking for excuses to go to California to hike, be a tourist, and be at the beach! My favorite activities are feeding my dog crunchy snacks to see which one crunches the loudest (nothing has been louder than Cape Cod potato chips), watching New Girl, playing field hockey because I was told it's the gateway to golf and I can't golf (yet), and maintaining my national title in Wii tennis! I'm super into food and I cook for my roommates every night. I also run Northeastern's food blog @spoon_university on instagram so I REALLY know the best places to eat in Boston! Love meeting new people so don't hesitate to reach out for lunch, a walk, some golf practice, or coffee! Can't wait to get to know you all !!

name: Jacob Kulik
text: Hey guys! I'm Jacob, a 2nd year data science and finance combined major. I'm a Ukrainian from Brooklyn (real New York). In my free time I love biking as well as running soccer/spikeball/poker/chess with friends! Always down to bike/walk into the city, the esplanade is fire. This summer I studied at the Copenhagen Business School (can't recommend it enough) and I've traveled to a total of around 10 countries and 30 states. I've also hiked in a ton of National parks in the US + Canada, Banff National park in Alberta is my fav. On campus, im a 2-time DS2000 TA and VP of Disrupt, the FinTech club. Can't wait to meet everyone!

name: SeungHwan Lee
text: Hey guys!! I'm SH (SeungHwan), a 2nd year Finance and Entrepreneurship major. I am an international student from South Korea. I went to high school in Jeju Island, which is 1 of the 7 wonders of nature and a UNESCO heritage! I played soccer, basketball, and volleyball in high school and I would love to play or watch any sports with any one you guys. Though I went to school in Jeju Island, my hometown is called Ulsan, South Korea which is located in the southern part of Korea. I am open to try out any new things so let me know if there is something interesting that I can try! I wish to make and have great memories, experiences, and friends at TAMID. Can't wait to meet all of you!

name: Jonathan Carson
text: Hey everyone! I'm Jonathan, a third year majoring in finance with a minor in cell and molecular biology. I was born and raised in Northern New Jersey, but have spent some time on Hilton Head Island in South Carolina as well. In my free time, I love to read (if you do to follow me on Goodreads! Tryna get that app poppin'!). I also play tennis, run, and take the boat out a lot when I'm down South. This summer I took a trip with 40 strangers through 10 different countries in Europe and had the time of my life! Can't wait to get to know y'all!

name: Derrick Gan
text: Hi everyone! I'm Derrick, a second year majoring in Data Science and Business with a minor in Psychology. I was born and raised in the Bay Area and even though I'm a second year, I don't think I'll ever get used to the cold here in Boston (nothing can top California weather). I love to play a wide variety of sports and I'm currently playing on the men's club basketball team here at Northeastern. In my free time, I love to play chess, read, cook, workout, explore Boston, thrift, and play some poker with friends. Super excited to meet all of you!

name: Ben DeMarinis
text: Hey guys! My name is Ben and I am from Long Island, New York. I am a second-year majoring in Business Administration with a concentration in Finance. I love to play tennis, I have played for about 9 years. I am always looking for new people to hit with, so please don't hesitate to ask. I also like to play pickle-ball and badminton and go to the gym. This might be an unpopular opinion but I prefer movies over TV shows and my favorite movie is Sicario. I also love to explore the city and try new restaurants, especially Italian and Mexican. Feel free to leave some restaurant recommendations, I am down to try anything. I am excited to get to know you all!

name: Launna Atkinson
text: Hi everyone! My name is Launna and I'm a second year majoring in data science and economics. I've lived in a suburb near Nashville, TN for the majority of my life but also lived in Shanghai, China and Minneapolis, Minnesota for a little when I was younger. I love to travel and read; I recently visited Chicago, Hilton Head Island, and Maui this summer, and I'm currently reading A Darker Shade of Magic (I recommend!). I have a cat named Benji, so please ask to meet him anytime :)) I also study at Snell or in nearby coffeeshops a lot, so feel free to hit me up and join me! Can't wait to meet everyone!

name: Khushi Sarkar
text: Yoo whats up!! I'm Khushi, and I'm a first year Business and combined major. hey everyone, I'm indian but i've lived in japan my entire life. I'm a foodie, i love to cook, sing and dance. i like listening to R&B music, Khalid, giveon, the weeknd and others. Lucifer and dynasty are some of my fav netflix shows. I love hanging out with friends, late night car rides and just talking to people in general. i'm excited to meet you all, feel free to reach out and let's be friends! Anyone wanna go grab boba??

name: Jonathan Pinkstone
text: Hey Everyone! My name is Jonathan and I am currently a second year studying fintech and computer science. I am from Yardley, Pennsylvania which is about 30 minutes north of Philadelphia. My favorite type of food is Indian food so if any of you want to go grab some soon hit me up.

name: Anushka Wani
text: Hi everyone!!! I'm Anushka, a second year Data Science and Business Admin major! I'm from Acton, MA which boasts a Dunkin AND a Starbucks right next to each other. I love watching youtube, abusing the indie mix on Spotify, watching anime/reading manga, and adding to the obscene amount of frog posts I have saved on Instagram. I'm a pretty spontaneous person so I'm down for literally anything and everything if I have the time! I also love having random conversations about whatever so definitely hit me up if you want to chat, rant, or anything else in between. So happy to meet everyone!!!

name: Ashna Jain
text: Hi everyone! I'm Ashna and I'm a 2nd year studying Computer Science and Business. I'm from Dallas and I will always stand by the fact that "y'all" is a perfectly acceptable word to use. I love hiking, skiing, and visiting mountainous areas. I played tennis for 8 years but I have a recently found out how fun spikeball is so I'm down to play sometime. I went to Ireland for NU.in so if anyone else has gone abroad, I'd love to swap stories! I spend a slightly concerning amount of time in Snell so I'm always down for a study session. I'm also a self-proclaimed coffee connoisseur and love going on coffee chats so let me know if you have any recommendations in Boston! I'm so excited to get to know you all!!

name: Elise Freedman
text: Hi y'all! My Name is Elise Freedman and I am a second year majoring in International Affairs and International Business with a minor in french. I am from Boulder, Colorado. Hmu if you want to adventure around the area. Some of my favorite sports include the North End, Boston Commons, and exploring new coffee shops! If you ever need a study-buddy, gym buddy or even a grocery shopping buddy lemme know.

name: Jake Ashkenase
text: Hey Everyone, I'm Jake and I'm a second year doing a combined major of Data science and Business administration. I'm from Haworth, New Jersey (as irrelevant as it gets) and I've lived there my entire life, so I enjoy exploring as much of the city as possible. I love to watch/play sports so if anyone wants to play some pickup or watch a Mets game definitely let me know. I've been trying to read a lot more lately so I'm always looking for a good book recommendation and I'll try my best to give one back. I'm really excited to meet everyone and to get started with TAMID!

name: Aarya Dhru
text: Hi guys! My name is Aarya Dhru and I'm a first year majoring in Business Administration with a concentration in Fintech. I'm from Greenwich, CT but I've moved all around the US, so I don't have a specific place I consider home. I was born in San Francisco, lived in Chicago suburbs for 10 years, and just outside of Boston for two years as well. Greenwich is only about 45 minutes from New York City, so I pretty much spent most of my weekends there. I like to go to the gym, listen to music (Frank Ocean, Tame Impala, the Weeknd, and CAS are my currents favs), and traveling. I also paint, dance, and i recently learned how to weld. I'm a very spontaneous person, so def hit me up if you ever want to do something impulsive or need a friend for anything. My favorite shows are Vincenzo, Business Proposal, and Gilmore Girls. Im excited to meet everyone!!

name: Gili Cohen
text: Hi guys!! My name is Gili and I'm a first year Comp Sci and Design major. I'm from Newton, Mass but I grew up in Israel until 6th grade and also took a gap year there this past year! I'm super into cooking, painting, working out, and music (Rex Orange County, Vance Joy, Steve Lacy, Still Woozy and also a bunch of Israeli artists I can put you on!). Random fun fact is that my dream is to move to Thailand for three months and become a certified Yoga instructor. I'm also absolutely in love with Boston and am willing to walk any distance to get myself around the city (seriously try me) so hmu if you're up to explore around together! Super excited to meet y'all and be a part of TAMID!!

name: Tania Gole
text: hi everyone!! my name is Tania and I'm a second year computer science major. name: Sydney Inouye
text: Hi everyone! My name is Sydney Inouye, and I am a second year health science and business administration major from Irvine, CA. Some of my hobbies include listening to music (DPR Live/IAN, The Neighbourhood, The Weeknd, NIKI, and SZA), watching anime/kdramas (Jujutsu Kaisen, Kimi ni Todoke, 2521, and My Liberation Notes), and going for late-night walks. I also love food/coffee. You will most likely find me waiting in line for new cafes+restaurants around Boston! Anyways, I am so grateful to be apart of TAMID's Ayin class. I cannot wait to meet you all!

name: Edward Marcus
text: Hi everyone! My name is Edward Marcus, a second year pursuing a major in international business and a minor in Spanish. I was born in DC/Maryland but moved to Oakland, California in 4th grade. I love playing sports such as soccer and volleyball as well as going up to the mountains to ski. I'm super into music especially Indie-alt & edm, and I recently started to learn to DJ. My ideal day is grabbing tacos and driving to the beach blasting music along the way and then playing spike ball on the beach! Yes west coast is the best coast (I stand by my argument) but I love Boston too! Can't wait to be a part of this community and compete more during the game nights!!!

name: Eric Shi
text: Hey guys! My name is Eric Shi. I'm a first year Data Science + Math major looking to get into the field of trading and quantitative finance. I come from Queens, NYC and I went to Brooklyn Tech H.S. I enjoy watching different shows, playing competitive video games, and doing some of my own retail trading. I also love working out and can always be found at Marino. I'm super thankful for this opportunity to meet all of you guys and I can't wait to make some amazing friendships through TAMID!

name: Tahmid Washy
text: Hi everyone, my name is Tahmid Washy and I'm a first year DS & Math major. I'm from Queens, NYC, but I went to school in the Upper West Side at Trinity. I competed in Track & Field for 6 years, did almost every event, and would love to talk about the trauma I endured there. It's a bit strange but I'm an avid Phoenix Suns fan (this was in 2019 so I'm not a bandwagon). I'm super interested in programming, nutrition, and exercise. I live in White Hall, so I spend a lot of time at Marino. I love conversing with people about anything, especially philosophy. I also, unfortunately, played League of Legends for 6 years so I'll talk about esports or anything in that scene too! So excited to meet all of you!

name: Harrison Seung-Kyu Park
text: Hi everyone! My name is Harrison Park and I'm a second year CS major. I'm from Seoul, South Korea though I was born in New Jersey. I moved to South Korea when I was about 2 years old and went to middle school in the Netherlands. During my high school years, I went back to South Korea and here I am. I've been playing soccer for my entire life so if any of you guys want to play soccer sometimes, hit me up. I also love listening to music - some of my favorite artists are Travis Scott, Drake, Blxst, Chris Brown, Tory Lanez, PND, and the list goes on. I'm really excited to kick this semester off with all of you guys!

name: Aviad Gamliel
text: Hi! I'm Aviad Gamliel and I'm a second year from Baltimore, Maryland. I'm studying Business Administration and Psychology with a concentration in finance. I was in the explore program last year but declared Business and Psych because I took Financial Accounting and The Moral Mind and loved them both. I am a huge music nerd, from knowing as much music as possible to learning about music composition and production in my free time. I'm currently listening to a lot of Mac Miller, A$AP Rocky, Madvillain, Frank Sinatra, Stevie Wonder, Daniel Caesar, Etta James, Ms. Lauryn Hill, and Erykah Badu. Growing up, I helped out making dinner most nights with my mother (who is an amazing cook) without realizing the important cooking skills that I was gaining. Now that I've got my own kitchen and need to cook for myself for the first time in my life, I've realized how much I love cooking and have begun experimenting with different recipes and pushing myself to my culinary limits. I love working out and spending time with friends, and I can't wait to meet you guys!

name: Yulong Shao
text: Hi everyone! My name is Yulong Shao, and I'm a second year studying Economics and Psychology. I was born and raised in Iowa and proud of it. I love playing soccer but also always down to join a random intramural team and kill it so just lmk. I love listening to music (lowkey a swiftie but favorite artist is tory lanez), watching anime, and going out and eating as much as I can. An ideal day for me would be going to all you can eat sushi for lunch and then all you can eat kbbq for dinner. Super excited to meet you all!!

name: Cat Diaz
text: Hi everyone! I'm Catherine, but you can call me Cat, and i'm a first year majoring in Business Administration with a concentration in Finance and Psychology. I was born and raised in Houston, Texas (which can be billed as the culinary capital), so if you're down to explore Boston for the best food you're on. I used to be an avid reader (my Percy Jackson knowledge is acclaimed), and I want to jump back in and would love recs! In my free time, I enjoy rewatching my favorite shows and movies (Shameless, Community, and Spirited Away), finding new music (Spotify's discover weekly saves me every Monday), and playing video games (fortnite fridays anyone?). I also recently bought a pickleball set so if anyone would like to hit the courts lmk! I'm really excited to meet everyone and be a part of the Peh class!

name: Kyler Psenka
text: Hi guys! My name is Kyler Psenka and I'm a second year computer science and business administration major with a concentration in Fintech. I'm from Charleston, South Carolina so if you have ever been to South Carolina I have probably been to the place you know. My main Hobbies at the time are Ultimate Frisbee, Soccer, Watching Anime, Playing video games (currently in a Stardew Valley phase), Cooking, and Working out, so if anyone ever wants to talk about or do any of those things please don't hesitate to reach out to me because I love learning and teaching about them. If anyone has any music recommendations or cooking recipes and ideas those are two things I can never get enough of. Thanks for reading my paragraph and I can't wait to meet y'all soon!

name: Amaey Pandit
text: Hi everyone! My names Amaey Pandit and Im from Central NJ (yes, it exists) from a town called Bridgewater. I'm a first year studying Data Science and Business Admin and I'm probably going to have a concentration in either finance or fintech. I'm a huge sports nut, and my favorite teams are all over the nation, but unfortunately almost all my teams are bad. I'm a die hard Commanders fan, Derrick Rose made me a Bulls fan, and I've also been a Red Sox fan since the Dustin Pedroia and David Ortiz era. In my free time, I love lifting, playing any sport, and playing the most basic video games (COD, fifa, 2k etc.). I like a lot of different music, but some of my favorite artists are Saint JHN, Brent Faiyaz, Tory Lanez and I've been liking a lot of country lately too. If you have literally any music recs, please tell me cause I'm trying to listen to more music. Lmk if you're tryna run any sports or lift together and I'm looking forward to meeting everyone!

name: Karishma Bhargava
text: Helloo my name is Karishma and I am a second year studying computer science & cognitive psychology!! I'm originally from the Chicago suburbs but I have lived in the Bay Area, California for the past 4 years and I love it there. Some of my favorite things to do are hiking, thrifting, traveling, going to bookstores, and crocheting. I love food and coffee - I'm half Taiwanese and half Indian so looking for good food recs for those cuisines in Boston. I also love playing sports, particularly soccer and also enjoy listening to music and podcasts!! I'm looking forward to TAMID chats and getting to know everyone.

name: Anoop Dindigal
text: What's up guys! My name is Anoop Dindigal, and I'm a first year studying Business Admin w a minor in Data Science and concentration in Fintech. I was born and raised in Sayreville, New Jersey, a small town in Central Jersey, which, just like Amaey said, definitely exists. In my free time I love watching and playing sports, and some of my favorite teams are the Kansas City chiefs (I promise I'm not a bandwagon), New York Yankees, and Manchester United. I love playing ping pong, basketball, and spikeball, so if anyone's ever playing those or any other sport hmu! I also love music, and some of my favorite artists are Tupac, Drake, Chris Brown, Michael Jackson and SZA. I played the tabla, an Indian drum, for a while, and can also play a little bit of piano, so I'm definitely getting into playing music as well. I love watching movies and tv shows too, and some of my favorite tv shows are the office, shameless, masterchef, and bridgerton. Some of my favorite movies are la la land and the social network, and I'm currently in a Bollywood movie phase, so if anyone has any movie recs lmk! I also really like traveling, late night drives, and swimming. I'm so excited to be part of this community, and I can't wait to meet everyone!

name: Shaurya Dubey
text: Hi everyone! I'm Shaurya and I'm from Princeton, NJ. I'm a first year Computer Science major, and I'm interested in Tech Consulting. Being from Jersey I'm a huge fan of New York sports and LOVE the Giants. In my free time I love working out, thrifting clothes, vinyl shopping and watching sports. I'm also big into movies and shows, some of my favorites being Seven, Interstellar, and Breaking Bad. I also love listening to music (mainly R&B) with some of my favorite artists being Frank Ocean, Brent Faiyaz, Avenoir, and Partynextdoor. I love going to concerts with my favorite one being Tyler the Creator. Sports wise, I'm big into Football, Basketball, and UFC, with my favorite fighter being Charles Oliveira. Recently I also love playing pickleball and basketball in my free time, and I'm excited to play more when it gets warmer outside. I'm so excited to get to know all of you and be a part of TAMID!!
